metadata.name: nova_pixel
metadata.description: Nova Pixel — Blockchain Pixel War Game

instructions.name: admin_buyback
docs: ADMIN: use buyback SOL to buy NVPX from Jupiter DEX.

accounts.name: destination_token_account
docs: Destination for bought-back NVPX (reserve or liquidity wallet ATA).

instructions.name: burn_tokens
docs: ADMIN: one-time burn of the 150,000,000 NVPX burn allocation (Phase 04).

instructions.name: buy_item
docs: Buy a Shield 3×3, Shield 5×5, or Rocket.  SOL goes to buyback_wallet.

accounts.name: buyback_wallet_state
docs: Buyback wallet PDA — receives the SOL.

instructions.name: buy_package
docs: Buy Starter / Advanced / Pro package — routes SOL through Jupiter → NVPX.
Pass Jupiter swap data and all required accounts as remaining_accounts.

accounts.name: sol_vault
docs: SOL vault PDA — receives SOL from player then signs the Jupiter CPI.

accounts.name: airdrop_wallet_state
docs: Airdrop wallet state — tracks in-pool NVPX balance.

accounts.name: airdrop_token_account
docs: NVPX token account owned by airdrop_wallet_state PDA.
Jupiter deposits purchased NVPX here.

instructions.name: capture_pixel
docs: Record a pixel capture: attacker takes the 2× reward from defender.

instructions.name: claim_airdrop
docs: Claim proportional airdrop share after the tournament ends.

accounts.name: airdrop_token_account
docs: Airdrop pool token account (source of airdrop tokens).

accounts.name: player_nvpx_account
docs: Player's NVPX token account (destination).

instructions.name: color_pixel
docs: Record a pixel coloring event and pay the 2× reward from the airdrop pool.

accounts.name: game_server
docs: Game server — trusted oracle that reports canvas events on-chain.

accounts.name: airdrop_wallet_state
docs: Airdrop wallet state — the source of 2× reward funds.

accounts.name: airdrop_token_account
docs: NVPX token account owned by airdrop_wallet_state (source of transfer).

accounts.name: player_nvpx_account
docs: Player's NVPX token account (destination of reward transfer).

instructions.name: connect_player
docs: Register a wallet and join a team (0 / 1 / 2).

instructions.name: emergency_pause
docs: MULTISIG: cast a pause vote (2-of-3 required to pause).

accounts.name: signer
docs: Must be one of the three registered multisig signers.

instructions.name: emergency_unpause
docs: ADMIN: unpause after security issue is resolved.

instructions.name: end_tournament
docs: ADMIN: close the tournament and begin airdrop distribution phase.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Deploy all PDAs and wallet states.  Called once by admin.

instructions.name: revoke_authorities
docs: ADMIN: permanently revoke mint + freeze authority — token becomes fully immutable.
Call once after full supply is minted. IRREVERSIBLE.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Must be the current mint authority AND freeze authority.

accounts.name: nvpx_mint
docs: The NVPX mint — admin must be the current mint authority.

instructions.name: rocket_resolve
docs: Game server removes a defender's shield after a Rocket purchase resolves.

instructions.name: sell_ingame
docs: Sell in-game NVPX during an active tournament.  50% penalty + 2% tax applied.

accounts.name: airdrop_wallet_state
docs: Airdrop wallet state — receives the 50% penalty.

accounts.name: development_wallet_state
docs: Development wallet state — receives the 2% tax.

accounts.name: player_nvpx_account
docs: Player's NVPX token account (source — their in-game holdings).

accounts.name: airdrop_token_account
docs: Airdrop pool token account (destination for penalty).

accounts.name: development_token_account
docs: Development wallet token account (destination for tax).

instructions.name: start_tournament
docs: ADMIN: open the tournament.

instructions.name: withdraw_locked
docs: ADMIN: withdraw from a time-unlocked development or reserve wallet.

errors.name: PlayerNotInitialized
errors.msg: Player account not initialized — call connect_player first

errors.name: InsufficientSolForItem
errors.msg: Insufficient SOL sent for this item

errors.name: InvalidPixelCoords
errors.msg: Pixel coordinates out of canvas bounds

errors.name: PixelShielded
errors.msg: Target pixel is protected by a shield

errors.name: NoShieldAtTarget
errors.msg: No active shield found at target location

errors.name: TooManyShields
errors.msg: Player has reached the maximum number of active shields

errors.name: ZeroPixelValue
errors.msg: Zero pixel value — must be positive

errors.name: NoAirdropAllocation
errors.msg: No airdrop allocation for this player

errors.name: AuthorityAlreadyRevoked
errors.msg: Mint and freeze authorities have already been permanently revoked

errors.name: InvalidSellAmount
errors.msg: Invalid sell amount — must be positive

types.name: WalletState
docs: State PDA for each locked program wallet.
The actual tokens live in the ATA owned by this PDA.
